name: Blue Kids' Soap Pump Dispenser - Pillowfort™
description: Bring style and convenience to your kid's daily routine with this Kids' Soap Pump Dispenser from Pillowfort™. Made of ceramic, this soap dispenser boasts a pump head with a long neck for easy dispensing. This blue soap pump features a raised "wash" text and a contrasting base in a beige hue for an eye-catching look. Compatible with lotions, liquid soaps and more, this 15.52-fluid-ounce soap dispenser is a great addition to your kid's bathroom.
